title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Meritnation Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Meritnation Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Meritnation Ventures Solutions in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Meritnation Ventures Solutions:
Meritnation Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meritnation Ventures Solutions!
